lines.speaker: Guide
lines.text: Welcome to Prontera, the capital of the Rune-Midgarts Kingdom! How can I help you, adventurer?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.text: If you're looking for monsters to train on, head east to Prontera Fields. For a greater challenge, the Geffen Dungeon lies to the west.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.text: Prontera has many services for adventurers. You can visit the item shop for potions, the weapon shop for equipment, and the skill master to learn new abilities.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.text: Is there anything else you'd like to know?

lines.speaker: Weaponsmith
lines.text: Welcome to my shop! I forge the finest weapons and armor in all of Rune-Midgarts. What are you looking for?

lines.speaker: Weaponsmith
lines.text: Take a look at my wares — I've got weapons, shields, and armor for adventurers of all levels.

lines.speaker: Item Merchant
lines.text: Welcome! I carry potions and supplies for your journey. Stock up before heading out!

lines.speaker: Item Merchant
lines.text: What can I get for you? I've got healing potions and mana recovery in stock.
